expanded_queries: What signals a strong displacement move?

final_chunks.section_title: CONCEPTUALIZING THE BEARISH MARKET STRUCTURE SHIFT
final_chunks.text:
CONCEPTUALIZING THE BEARISH MARKET STRUCTURE SHIFT
A bearish market structure shift conceptually looks like: Trades above an old high (or the initial short-term high it traded above). Breaks down, specifically breaking below a prior short-term low. This break creates the new trade idea.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT & FVG HUNT ZONE
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT & FVG HUNT ZONE
Market structure shifts occur on all timeframes. For intraday trading: The high that forms after the run on liquidity is the 'displacement high. ' The low that breaks the prior short-term low is the 'displacement low.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: THE ELEPHANT IN THE SWIMMING POOL
final_chunks.text:
THE ELEPHANT IN THE SWIMMING POOL
Displacement is crucial. When price goes above an old high and then trades down below it, you need to see an 'obvious displacement'.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT IN MARKET PRICE
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT IN MARKET PRICE
You are looking for which side of the marketplace has most recently shown a displacement. Has price moved away from price levels aggressively? Was there speed involved?
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DISPLACEMENT TOWARDS LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
DISPLACEMENT TOWARDS LIQUIDITY
When observing price, look for decisive displacement, not just a drift. Price indicates it is reaching for something, specifically the liquidity resting below old lows.
final_chunks.source: ICT Institutional Price Action： Micro-Market Structure & Time & Price Concepts Part 02_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING FAIR VALUE GAPS (FVG) AFTER DISPLACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING FAIR VALUE GAPS (FVG) AFTER DISPLACEMENT
After a swing high is taken out and an energetic break below it occurs: Look for a clear Fair Value Gap (FVG) formed by a smashing down movement. The low, the high, and if price trades back up into that FVG, you look for a short entry.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET RALLY, DISPLACEMENT, IMPULSE SWING, AND RETRACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
MARKET RALLY, DISPLACEMENT, IMPULSE SWING, AND RETRACEMENT
The market has to rally first in order to have displacement. The market creates an Impulse price swing. When that impulse price swing occurs, we wait for the retracement.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DISPLACEMENT AND FAIR VALUE GAP
final_chunks.text:
DISPLACEMENT AND FAIR VALUE GAP
So that area right there, as soon as you run above the relative equal highs, in your mind, you're looking for, 'Where's the trigger. ' Because until it takes out that short-term low, there's nothing going on. There's no trade there, there's no setup there.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 24_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DRILLING DOWN TO THE 1-MINUTE CHART FOR ENTRY
final_chunks.text:
DRILLING DOWN TO THE 1-MINUTE CHART FOR ENTRY
As the market trades lower after running the 15-minute high: Look for FVG: On lower timeframes, check for FVG formations after a displacement. For example, on a 4 minute chart, after breaking a swing low, a FVG might appear for a short entry.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DISPLACEMENT LEG AND LOWER TIMEFRAME PREMIUM
final_chunks.text:
DISPLACEMENT LEG AND LOWER TIMEFRAME PREMIUM
If you look at this displacement leg, you might measure it and say it didn't go to a premium. I don't expect it to go to a premium here because the market is in a hurry to get down below the 3855 level for the week.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 33_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MICRO ORDER BLOCK ENTRY AND ALGORITHMIC PRECISION
final_chunks.text:
MICRO ORDER BLOCK ENTRY AND ALGORITHMIC PRECISION
Following the displacement, identify the specific up-close candle that forms the order block for a potential The high on the retesting candle is exactly 3243.00. This perfect retest indicates algorithmic operation, not random market movement.
final_chunks.source: ICT Institutional Price Action： Micro-Market Structure & Time & Price Concepts Part 02_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET ACTION ANALYSIS (15-MINUTE CHART): LACK OF DISPLACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
MARKET ACTION ANALYSIS (15-MINUTE CHART): LACK OF DISPLACEMENT
So with that area shaded right here, this is a 15-minute chart. You can see we traded down into it. The candle stopped right at the old candle high, and the next candle just gave up the ghost right away.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 24_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MACROS AS TIME WINDOWS FOR ANTICIPATING MARKET ANIMATION
final_chunks.text:
MACROS AS TIME WINDOWS FOR ANTICIPATING MARKET ANIMATION
Macros are time aspects that indicate when the market is anticipated to start 'animating' or 'reaching'.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Algorithmic Price Delivery & Time Macros Intro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DEFINING MARKET MACROS AND KEY EXAMPLES
final_chunks.text:
DEFINING MARKET MACROS AND KEY EXAMPLES
A 'macro' is a small program that unfolds within the algorithm. It is essentially a price run from one level to Example 1: A price run from one liquidity level to another during a specific time.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Market Maker Series Vol. 5 of 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: THE 'SPOOLING EVENT' METAPHOR FOR MACROS
final_chunks.text:
THE 'SPOOLING EVENT' METAPHOR FOR MACROS
A macro is essentially the beginning of a 'spooling event' where price starts to reach for a target. Analogy: Like casting a fishing line, the reel 'spools' out line, delivering the hook and bait far away.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Algorithmic Price Delivery & Time Macros Intro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY DELIVERY
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY DELIVERY
The 9:50-10:10 AM macro is observed after initial liquidity (buy side) has been engaged.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Algorithmic Price Delivery & Time Macros Intro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET DYNAMICS AND CORRELATION
final_chunks.text:
MARKET DYNAMICS AND CORRELATION
The 9:50-10:10 AM macro is a 20-minute period specializing in market behavior around the first 30 minutes Applicable to both Forex and Futures, as all markets are interconnected. Discordant correlation can signal impending abrupt changes.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Algorithmic Price Delivery & Time Macros Intro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ES 1-MINUTE MACRO
final_chunks.text:
ES 1-MINUTE MACRO
When seeking directional bias for higher prices, a stop run on sell-side liquidity occurred, followed by price going higher into an inefficiency and then retracing into it during lunch hours. The buy-side is above relative On the 1-minute chart, 4487. 50 is identified as buy-side.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Advanced Theory On ICT Breaker_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ES 1-MINUTE MACRO
final_chunks.text:
ES 1-MINUTE MACRO
In normal instances, if bearish, the market would rip up, take out buy-side, and work lower. However, being in a higher timeframe bullish buy program means the shaded blue weekly volume imbalance and the old high on June 16, 2023, represent buy-side liquidity.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Advanced Theory On ICT Breaker_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ANTICIPATING ORG REPRICING MACRO AND TRADE ENTRY
final_chunks.text:
ANTICIPATING ORG REPRICING MACRO AND TRADE ENTRY
The stop loss was placed just above the consequent encroachment of the higher fair value gap, as demonstrated in the trade execution.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - Opening Range Gap Repricing Macro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LAST HOUR MACRO AND ALGORITHMIC BEHAVIOR
final_chunks.text:
LAST HOUR MACRO AND ALGORITHMIC BEHAVIOR
So I'm going to take you into the last hour of trading and revisit that final hour macro. And a macro is a short little list of instructions or directives for an algorithm to run and they tend to repeat.
final_chunks.source: February 14, 2023 ES Live Commentary CPI Release_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: STOP HUNT & ENTICEMENT
final_chunks.text:
STOP HUNT & ENTICEMENT
The consolidation during New York lunch hour (12:00 PM This entices retail traders to perceive it as support, leading them to go long. This setup is a classic lunch hour stop hunt macro. The algorithm uses this specific time window to reprice to those stops.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Review Precision Results_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SILVER BULLET, LUNCH MACRO, AND NFP PROFILE INTEGRATION
final_chunks.text:
SILVER BULLET, LUNCH MACRO, AND NFP PROFILE INTEGRATION
Price drops during the 10:00-11:00 AM Silver Bullet window, providing entries. It trades down to the consequent encroachment of both the daily bullish propulsion block and the hourly Fair Value Gap.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Algorithmic Price Delivery & Time Macros Intro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MACROS DO NOT PROVIDE DIRECTION
final_chunks.text:
MACROS DO NOT PROVIDE DIRECTION
It is critical to understand that macros DO NOT give direction. They indicate when price will start to move or 'spool', not where it will go.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Algorithmic Price Delivery & Time Macros Intro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MACRO LEVELS, SELL-SIDE ENGAGEMENT, AND SHORT-SELLER VULNERABILITY
final_chunks.text:
MACRO LEVELS, SELL-SIDE ENGAGEMENT, AND SHORT-SELLER VULNERABILITY
The 1010 macro level often coincides with the engagement of sell-side liquidity. A rhetorical question is posed to illustrate the market's effect on short sellers: if one were short, would a stop at 4136 feel safe.
final_chunks.source: February 15, 2023 ES Live Commentary AM Opening Session_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: BIG FIGURE SIGNIFICANCE AND NEW YORK SESSION WINDOW
final_chunks.text:
BIG FIGURE SIGNIFICANCE AND NEW YORK SESSION WINDOW
The big figure of 2900 is significant. When price trades into or sweeps a big figure, it generally creates a tradable bounce or retracement. Even if short-lived, it offers an opportunity for quick market snaps.
final_chunks.source: OTE Pattern Recognition Series - Vol. 03_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: THE PRIMACY OF TIME IN ALGORITHMIC PRICE DELIVERY
final_chunks.text:
THE PRIMACY OF TIME IN ALGORITHMIC PRICE DELIVERY
To accurately interpret price movements, the daily key level (3256. 5) must be incorporated with the element of time. The correct paradigm is 'Time and Price,' not 'Price and Time. ' Time is the primary factor influencing how price is delivered.
final_chunks.source: ICT Institutional Price Action： Micro-Market Structure & Time & Price Concepts Part 02_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PRICE MOVEMENT BETWEEN PREMIUM AND DISCOUNT
final_chunks.text:
PRICE MOVEMENT BETWEEN PREMIUM AND DISCOUNT
Price moves between a premium array and a discount array, or vice versa. Within these two realms, price will key off a time element linked to the up-to-date range.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 07 - Short Term Trading Low Resistance Liquidity Runs Part 1_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: THE MACRO VIEW
final_chunks.text:
THE MACRO VIEW
Consolidation brings expansion. When the market is identified as likely to trade in a small range or consolidation day, immediately note that the next trading day, or a day not long after, will likely produce a large range or trending day.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 10 - Bond Trading - Consolidation Days_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MACRO SCALE CONFIRMATION FOR HIGHER TIMEFRAME DIRECTION
final_chunks.text:
MACRO SCALE CONFIRMATION FOR HIGHER TIMEFRAME DIRECTION
You just need a few things on a macro scale to support the idea that on a higher time frame, prices should be trading higher.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MACRO TO MICRO AND ADMITTING ERROR
final_chunks.text:
MACRO TO MICRO AND ADMITTING ERROR
You will be correct more than you're incorrect. It doesn't feel like it now, Michael, but you will be.
final_chunks.source: If I Could Go Back & Tell Myself What I Know Now... Part 4 of 4_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: NARRATIVE AS CRUCIAL TO MACRO UNDERSTANDING
final_chunks.text:
NARRATIVE AS CRUCIAL TO MACRO UNDERSTANDING
Beyond technical aspects of time, understanding the market's narrative is absolutely crucial for knowing what a macro will do. A macro is not a 'magic pill'; it requires understanding what price is likely to do.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Algorithmic Price Delivery & Time Macros Intro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: THE IMPORTANCE OF CONTEXT IN MACRO APPLICATION
final_chunks.text:
THE IMPORTANCE OF CONTEXT IN MACRO APPLICATION
Without proper context, understanding the specific times of day called a macro is not helpful. It is emphasized not to teach something you don't fully understand yet.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Algorithmic Price Delivery & Time Macros Intro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SIMPLE PROCEDURES AND MACRO PERSPECTIVE
final_chunks.text:
SIMPLE PROCEDURES AND MACRO PERSPECTIVE
I am confident these simple procedures won't be misunderstood. My advice: don't build on this immediately or add more things. We'll discuss candlestick patterns, but not a whole slew of them.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex Scout Sniper Basic Field Guide - Vol. 4_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: NORMAL PROCEDURE
final_chunks.text:
NORMAL PROCEDURE
The normal procedure is that you're looking for a market that's predisposed to go higher. You have higher time frame macro ideas behind the notion that markets should go higher.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: OPPORTUNITY DISCOVERY
final_chunks.text:
OPPORTUNITY DISCOVERY
Identify the previous day's low or an intra-week low when the bias is bearish. Identify the previous day's high or an intra-week high when the bias is bullish. Expect a daily range expansion in the direction of this bias.
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model 5 Trade Plan_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET MOVEMENT AND MARKET MAKER INTENT
final_chunks.text:
MARKET MOVEMENT AND MARKET MAKER INTENT
We'll be able to see these things unfolding in advance and you'll be able to see what should take place.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 1 - Fair Valuation_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DEFINING THE RANGE FOR DISCOUNT PD ARRAY MATRIX
final_chunks.text:
DEFINING THE RANGE FOR DISCOUNT PD ARRAY MATRIX
We define our range by our point of origin and the intermediate term high prior to the retracement. Once these two markers are identified, you define that range in terms of discount to premium.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FIBONACCI EXPANSION LEVELS FOR PD ARRAY MATRIX
final_chunks.text:
FIBONACCI EXPANSION LEVELS FOR PD ARRAY MATRIX
You have the point three Fibonacci extension (30), the one level (which is going to be the 100 level). Okay, you just double-click on the little area if you want to make any changes, change it to whatever you want to classify it.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - High Probability Swing Trade Setups In Bull Markets_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: CONSEQUENT ENCROACHMENT AND FIB PROJECTION
final_chunks.text:
CONSEQUENT ENCROACHMENT AND FIB PROJECTION
I have this consequent encouragement, it's not really a consequent encouragement, but it's the level of fib projection off of this here. And also if we measure the consequent encroachment of that sell side imbalance.
final_chunks.source: March 07, 2023 Live Tape Reading ⧹ Fed Chair Testimony 10am_Handbook.blocks.json
